nasb.text: For He established a testimony in Jacob And appointed a law in Israel, Which He commanded our fathers That they should teach them to their children,

esv.text: He established a testimony in Jacob and appointed a law in Israel, which he commanded our fathers to teach to their children,

cnv.text: 他在雅各設立法度， 在以色列中制訂律法， 就是他吩咐我們的列祖， 去教訓他們的子孫的，

ccb.text: 因为祂为雅各制定法度， 为以色列设立律法， 又吩咐我们的祖先把这些律法传给儿女，

csbs.text: 他在雅各中立下法度，在以色列中设立律法， 这律法是他吩咐我们的祖先教导子孙的，
